---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, strategy, or improvement
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of what you want to add or change. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What gap does this fill? What pain point does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. How should it work from the user's perspective? -->

## Strategy Details *(if proposing a new trading strategy)*

<!-- Complete this section only for new signal detection or trade management logic. -->

**Premise:**
<!-- What market behaviour does this strategy exploit? -->

**Entry conditions:**
<!-- List the exact conditions that trigger a signal. -->

**Filters:**
<!-- What confirms or invalidates the signal? (e.g. divergence, trend, volatility) -->

**Exit rules:**
<!-- Stop loss, take profit, and any trailing/ratcheting logic. -->

**Back-test result (optional):**
<!-- Symbol, date range, win rate, profit factor, max drawdown. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about? Why did you reject them? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Mockups, reference papers, links to similar implementations, etc. -->
